error.signature: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.NotEnoughReplicasException: Messages are rejected since there are fewer in-sync replicas than required

verdict.summary: min.insync.replicas not met. Too many brokers are down or lagging behind the leader.

dead_ends.why_fails: min.insync.replicas=1 with acks=all provides no durability guarantee. A single broker failure can lose acknowledged writes.

dead_ends.action: Switch producer to acks=0 or acks=1 to bypass ISR check
dead_ends.why_fails: Bypasses the safety net. Messages are acknowledged before replication, risking data loss on broker failure.

workarounds.action: Bring the down brokers back online to restore ISR
workarounds.how: sudo systemctl start kafka  # on each down broker; check: kafka-topics.sh --describe --topic my_topic

workarounds.action: Verify ISR membership and wait for replicas to catch up
workarounds.how: kafka-topics.sh --describe --topic my_topic --bootstrap-server localhost:9092  # check Isr column

workarounds.action: Set appropriate min.insync.replicas for your replication factor
workarounds.how: For replication-factor=3, set min.insync.replicas=2. Allows 1 broker failure while maintaining durability.
